programme.title: Truly, Madly, Sweetly
programme.desc: When Natalie and Eric each inherit a share of an old bakery, this unlikely pair must decide what's in store for this historic landmark. When both of their careers come to a screeching halt, an opportunity presents itself.

programme.title: Crown for Christmas
programme.desc: After getting fired from her job, Allie accepts a temp job as governess to Princess Theodora. A spark forms between Allie and Theodora's father Maximillion, the King of Winshire.

programme.title: Love in Design
programme.desc: In need of a shakeup on her home-makeover TV show, Hannah is sent to her New England hometown to renovate the historical Lewisburg Manor. Her old flame Jeff is assigned to make sure Hannah's design preserves the historical manor.

programme.title: Season for Love
programme.desc: When a talented chef returns to her Texas hometown, she winds up entering the town's famous BBQ cookoff and gets more than she bargained for when the surprise judge turns out to be her high school love. Stars Autumn Reeser.

programme.title: Love, Once and Always
programme.desc: When Lucy's childhood sweetheart plans to tear down the Gilded Age estate and replace it with a golf course, Lucy fights to preserve the historic mansion at all costs. Stars Amanda Schull and Peter Porte.

programme.title: A Valentine's Match
programme.desc: Fired from her job as a reality TV host, Natalie returns home for Valentine's Day, only to find herself running the town festival's auction with her ex-fiance thanks to two scheming mothers. Bethany Joy Lenz, Luke Macfarlane.

programme.title: Love on the Sidelines
programme.desc: A romantic comedy about a down-on-her-luck young woman who falls into a job as a personal assistant to a star quarterback. He's never had a female assistant before and she knows nothing about football.

programme.title: Unleashing Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: Elizabeth gets the opportunity of showing her dog in a New York dog show. The judge, Donovan Darcy, comes across as aristocratic and rude, and a chain of misunderstandings unfold, complicating their attraction to one another.

programme.title: Marrying Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: Elizabeth and Donovan are very different people; she's a down-to-earth high school teacher and he's a reserved New York businessman. So, when they get engaged, their trip to the altar is lively and unpredictable.

programme.title: A Royal Christmas
programme.desc: Prince Leopold, heir to the throne of Cordinia, falls in love with Emily Taylor, a humble seamstress from Philadelphia. But the young prince's wishes are challenged by his mother, who wants him to marry royalty.

programme.title: Love at First Dance
programme.desc: Hope is tasked with teaching Manhattan's former "Most Eligible Bachelor" how to dance for his extravagant, society wedding. But as the dance lessons progress, complications ensue when feelings begin to develop between them.

programme.title: A Harvest Wedding
programme.desc: Sarah, a wedding planner in New York, is hired to plan the most anticipated wedding of the season. But the bride wants the wedding to be on the family farm which is now being run by her older brother who happens to be Sarah's ex.

programme.title: At Home in Mitford
programme.desc: With a case of writer's block, a children's author escapes to small town Mitford for a change of scenery. She soon finds the heart and soul of the southern town in a priest as they work together to care for a young boy.

programme.title: One Winter Weekend
programme.desc: Cara, a magazine writer, who gets burned by her boyfriend on New Years' Eve, decides to go on a dating detox. Challenged by her employer to write about it, she hopes a ski getaway with her best friend will spark inspiration.

programme.title: Frozen in Love
programme.desc: When struggling bookstore owner Mary and the bad boy of professional hockey, Adam, are teamed together to help facilitate an image makeover for the other, they soon realize that opposites attract.

programme.title: Royal Hearts
programme.desc: Montana rancher Hank learns he's the last heir of the late King of Merania and has inherited the throne. His daughter convinces the reluctant royal to step in as King so the country can keep its independence.

programme.title: Harvest Love
programme.desc: A widowed surgeon visits her family's pear orchard in hopes of reconnecting with her distant son. She starts to fall for the farm manager, Will, who is growing a new hybrid pear, and teaches her the importance of her heritage.

programme.title: Campfire Kiss
programme.desc: Feeling disconnected with her son, Dana decides to take him camping. As soon as she arrives, Dana starts butting heads with her cabin neighbor, Steve, a single father and outdoorsman who trying to connect with his daughter.

programme.title: Sun, Sand & Romance
programme.desc: Kate is a driven publishing exec visiting a summer resort with her boyfriend Eric. There she runs into Shep, an old high school friend and fellow camp counselor, who is now the Activities Director.

programme.title: Groundswell
programme.desc: On the heels of a personal and professional setback, Chef Emma travels to Hawaii where she meets Ben, a handsome, reclusive surf instructor whose lessons help her to regain her footing. Starring Lacey Chabert, Ektor Rivera.

programme.title: Sand Dollar Cove
programme.desc: Stamford developer Elli works on acquiring beachfront property in Sand Dollar Cove, a quaint Connecticut beach town, but falls for the town's charm and property owner in the process. Chad Michael Murray, Aly Michalka, Clare Bowen.

programme.title: Making Waves
programme.desc: When a music label executive goes to a festival on the Outer Banks to beat out the competition for an elusive new band, she discovers that the group is fronted by her childhood summer sweetheart. Stars Holland Roden, Corey Cott.

programme.title: A Country Wedding
programme.desc: A country western star returns to his hometown to sell his childhood home prior to his wedding. Upon his arrival, he meets the girl he proposed to when he was 8-years-old and she helps plan the wedding in his fiances absence.

programme.title: My One & Only
programme.desc: Contestants on The One, Stephanie and Oliver try to determine if they're fated to be together. Meanwhile, sparks fly between Stephanie and Alex, the handsome ranch owner who acts as their guide. Stars Pascale Hutton and Sam Page.

programme.title: Matching Hearts
programme.desc: As Valentine's Day nears, a matchmaker is tasked by her mentor to find a match for an entrepreneur who believes staying single is the key to success. Stars Taylor Cole and Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: An Unexpected Valentine
programme.desc: A chance encounter on Valentine's Day brings Hannah and Finn together as they race through New York City to return a lost engagement ring and save one couple's special day. Stars Lacey Chabert, Robert Buckley.

programme.title: Lost in Paradise
programme.desc: When the founder of a high-end fashion company gets marooned on an "deserted" island with a chef, romance blossoms as they work together to survive. Starring Lacey Chabert and Ian Harding.

programme.title: Missing the Boat
programme.desc: Strangers Kelly and Parker both end up on the same Italian cruise, but after missing the boat during a stop, they're forced to team up and race across southern Italy to catch up. Stars Emilie Ullerup and Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: It Was Always You
programme.desc: Elizabeth's engagement plans are thrown into disarray when her fiancé's free-spirited brother David returns home. David's unexpected influence prompts Elizabeth to question her life decisions. Stars Erin Krakow, Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: Maddie is doing everything she can to save her cupcake business. With the help of a handsome investment banker, Maddie's luck begins to turn around in all aspects of her life. But then her first love Nate unexpectedly returns.

programme.title: To Barcelona, With Love
programme.desc: Erica, an American translator, secretly revises a novel set in Barcelona. Everything is fine until bookstore owner Nico invites the credited author, Anna, to the city for a book-signing. Stars Alison Sweeney, Ashley Williams.

programme.title: To Barcelona, Forever
programme.desc: As Anna travels back to Barcelona, reuniting with Erica to celebrate her engagement to Nico, she meets a charming farmer and accidentally finds herself "engaged" to save his family's legacy. Stars Ashley Williams, Alison Sweeney.

programme.title: Under the Autumn Moon
programme.desc: When an executive convinces her boss that a ranch would be perfect for their company retreats, he agrees to let her check it out. Her plan hits a snag when the owner refuses to sell unless she can promise to preserve its history.

programme.title: 3 Bed, 2 Bath, 1 Ghost
programme.desc: A 1920's ghost refuses to leave estate agent Anna's newly listed home. Worse, the spirit is convinced she cannot "pass over" until she gets Anna back together with her ex. Stars Julie Gonzalo, Chris McNally, Madeleine Arthur.

programme.title: Haul Out the Halloween
programme.desc: New, Halloween-obsessed neighbors inspire residents of Evergreen Lane to haul out their spookiest costumes and décor to become EverSCREAM Lane. Stars Lacey Chabert, Wes Brown, Stephen Tobolowsky, Melissa Peterman, Ellen Travolta.

programme.title: Wedding Season
programme.desc: Journalist Trish is on back-to-back bridesmaid duty for her three best friends. Finding herself without a date, she pairs up with photographer Ryan, the brother of her best friend. Stars Stephanie Bennett & Casey Deidrick.

programme.title: Raise a Glass to Love
programme.desc: Aspiring Master Sommelier Jenna returns to her family vineyard to study and is intrigued by the natural methods of the handsome new, Argentinian winemaker, Marcelo. Stars Laura Osnes, Juan Pablo Di Pace.

programme.title: The Wedding Cottage
programme.desc: A wedding guide creator must convince an uninspired artist and owner of a special wedding cottage to renovate the run down cottage to host a contest winning couple for their dream wedding. Starring Erin Krakow and Brendan Penny.

programme.title: Villa Amore
programme.desc: Liara goes to Italy and impulsively buys the villa where her parents met. She soon learns she is in way over her head and must ask a lawyer-turned-handyman to help her renovate. Stars Eloise Mumford, Kevin McGarry.

programme.title: Winter Castle
programme.desc: When Jenny attends a wedding at a magical ice hotel, she is surprised when she connects with the best man, Craig, and his daughter. Will the romance of the hotel bring them together? Stars Emilie Ullerup and Kevin McGarry.

programme.title: A Newport Christmas
programme.desc: The charitable Ella heads out on a boat in 1905 and ends up in 2025. Nick has to figure out how to get her back in time-and decide if their newfound love can stand the test of it. Starring Ginna Claire Mason, Wes Brown.

programme.title: Deck the Walls
programme.desc: Interior designer, Rose DeMonte, uses her skills back in her hometown to renovate a Christmas Charity Home for her brother Sal and his contractor Brysen's home flipping company. Stars Ashley Greene and Wes Brown.

programme.title: Never Kiss a Man in a Christmas Sweater
programme.desc: Single mom Maggie is facing Christmas alone until Lucas crashes into her life and becomes an unexpected houseguest. Together they overcome Christmas while finding comfort in their growing bond. Stars Ashley Williams, Niall Matter.

programme.title: 'Tis the Season to be Merry
programme.desc: Looking for a fresh angle to her book on relationships, Merry heads to snow covered Vermont. She finds a new perspective and Christmas cheer with charismatic aid worker Adam. Starring Rachael Leigh Cook and Travis Van Winkle.

programme.title: Rescuing Christmas
programme.desc: Erin is granted 3 Christmas wishes – with her final wish being that Christmas would just disappear. And to her bewilderment, it does! Can potential suitor Sam help her bring back Christmas? Stars Rachael Leigh Cook, Sam Page.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Claus
programme.desc: Avery Quinn's shot at anchoring news clashes with a Santa-suited intruder, Chris, who insists he's Santa's son on a first Christmas mission. They unravel a career-making story together. Starring Italia Ricci and Luke MacFarlane.

programme.title: Trading Up Christmas
programme.desc: Michelle helps her sister find a new home for Christmas by trading items for those of greater value. A local reporter shares her journey, inspiring the community to rally behind her. Starring Italia Ricci and Michael Xavier.

programme.title: She's Making a List
programme.desc: Isabel needs to determine if a young girl belongs on the Naughty or Nice List; meanwhile, she's falling for the girl's father and learning that the world isn't so black and white. Starring Lacey Chabert, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Christmas at the Plaza
programme.desc: When historian Jessica is hired to create The Plaza's Christmas display, she finds more than facts while teaming up with handsome decorator Nick to bring the display to life. Starring Elizabeth Henstridge and Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: A Grand Ole Opry Christmas (Extended Cut)
programme.desc: Grand Ole Opry magic takes Gentry and her friend, Mac, back in time to Christmas 1995. There, she's able to spend time with her late country star dad, as well as discover romance with Mac. Starring Nikki DeLoach, Kris Polaha.

programme.title: A Very Merry Mix-Up
programme.desc: A woman goes to meet her fiancé's family at Christmas and winds up at the wrong house. Once the mistake is corrected, she realizes that her bond with the wrong family, and their eligible son, was stronger than she expected.

programme.title: The Christmas Note
programme.desc: Gretchen returns to her hometown with son Ethan and meets her new neighbor Melissa. Melissa's mother has passed away, and the two form a reluctant friendship when Melissa discovers she has a sibling she never knew about.

programme.title: A Veteran's Christmas
programme.desc: Separated from her K9 partner Captain Grace is stranded in a small town for Christmas. Judge Joe offers her a place to stay and takes it upon himself to show Grace everything she's been missing. Stars Eloise Mumford, Sean Faris.

programme.title: Christmas on Duty
programme.desc: After a snowstorm prevents all the presents from being delivered to base, two rival marines must team up for a special mission…to save Christmas. Stars Janel Parrish, Parker Young, Peter Jacobson.

programme.title: Sugarplummed
programme.desc: When Emily wishes for a perfect Christmas like the ones found in the popular "Sugarplum" movies, she's shocked when Sugarplum herself appears to help her fulfill it. Stars Maggie Lawson and Janel Parrish.

programme.title: Small Town Christmas
programme.desc: When a young novelist travels to the hometown of the man who inspired her book, she reconnects with an old flame and helps restore the town's Christmas traditions. Stars Kristoffer Polaha and Ashley Newbrough.

programme.title: Hope at Christmas
programme.desc: Sydney and her young daughter come to small town Hopewell for Christmas. There, they spend time at the local bookstore, getting to know its owner, Bea, and local teacher, Mac. Stars Scottie Thompson, Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: Coyote Creek Christmas
programme.desc: While throwing a "Christmas Around the World" party at her family's inn, an event planner discovers Christmas magic with a charming father-son duo whose presence brings about tension and joy. Stars Janel Parrish and Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: Christmas Waltz
programme.desc: After Avery's storybook Christmas wedding is canceled, a dance instructor helps her face her fears in life and fulfill her dream of learning to dance. Stars Lacey Chabert and Will Kemp.

programme.title: A Suite Holiday Romance
programme.desc: Sabrina, an aspiring writer rejoices when hired to ghostwrite for a famous art dealer at an iconic hotel during Christmas. She learns to take risks and falls in love with a British visitor. Jessy Schram, Dominic Sherwood.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: A Tale of Three Letters
programme.desc: The POstables are back identifying the intended recipients of a trio of dead letters which have a surprising, personal impact on all of them. Stars Eric Mabius, Kristin Booth, Yan-Kay Crystal Lowe, Geoff Gustafson, Rhiannon Fish.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Murder, with Love
programme.desc: Former prosecutor-turned-therapist Hailey Dean is acutely observant. During a tragic week, one of her patients loses her parents to fatal accidents. Stars Kellie Martin, Viv Leacock, Giacomo Baessato, Cindy Busby.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Deadly Estate
programme.desc: When Hailey helps her friend Pam sell her recently deceased parent's estate, she becomes suspicious when Pam suddenly leaves town without notice. To make matters worse, Pam's boyfriend is the sudden victim of an accident.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Dating is Murder
programme.desc: Attorney turned therapist Hailey Dean is pulled into another investigation when a popular new dating app links multiple missing persons cases from around the city. Stars Kellie Martin.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries: Site Unseen
programme.desc: A dedicated archaeologist gets involved in a murder investigation when she and her students unearth a dead body while searching for evidence of a 17th-century coastal Maine settlement. Stars Courtney Thorne-Smith and James Tupper.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries: Past Malice
programme.desc: When Emma Fielding is recruited to aid in a groundbreaking discovery beneath the Chandler Castle, she is swept into another mystery when she finds her colleague murdered in the crypts. Stars Courtney Thorne Smith, James Tupper.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries: More Bitter than Death
programme.desc: After a friend and head of the National Archaeological Society meets an untimely death, Emma and Agent Conner find themselves questioning her colleagues' motives. Stars Courtney Thorne-Smith, James Tupper.

programme.title: Ruby Herring Mysteries: Silent Witness
programme.desc: When consumer reporter, Ruby Herring stumbles onto a murder, the spunky redhead discovers a knack for crime solving. With the help of a handsome detective, Ruby finds a new career covering crime. Stars Taylor Cole, Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: Ruby Herring Mysteries: Her Last Breath
programme.desc: Ruby and Detective Killian investigate a suspicious fatal car accident. With their yin and yang relationship, they solve the case, until Ruby finds new evidence that they may have it all wrong. Stars Taylor Cole, Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: Ruby Herring Mysteries: Prediction Murder
programme.desc: When crime reporter Ruby Herring receives clues to a murder that happened five years earlier involving a local psychic, she joins forces with Detective Jake Killian to help crack the case. Stars Taylor Cole, Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: Darrow & Darrow Pilot
programme.desc: Claire Darrow, a lawyer, fights for what's right, regardless of whether it makes her a dime. Joanna, Claire's estranged mother and a lawyer as well, would rather make a profit. They clash on nearly everything.

programme.title: Chronicle Mysteries: Recovered
programme.desc: Alex McPherson launches a podcast with a cold case from her past. With the help of local reporter, Drew Godfrey, new mysteries mix with old as the two work to recover what's been lost. Starring Alison Sweeney and Benjamin Ayres.

programme.title: Picture Perfect Mysteries: Newlywed and Dead
programme.desc: Photographer Allie Adams is shocked when the groom at a wedding she is covering is shot dead. What's even worse, is she must convince Detective Sam Acosta that her brother isn't the killer. Stars Alexa PenaVega, Carlos PenaVega.

programme.title: Picture Perfect Mysteries: Dead Over Diamonds
programme.desc: Photographer Allie and Detective Sam's investigation into a priceless stolen necklace leads to danger and an unexpected death. Stars Alexa & Carlos PenaVega, Erik Estrada.

programme.title: Picture Perfect Mysteries: Exit Stage Death
programme.desc: Allie and Sam navigate the world of amateur theatrics as they pursue the killer of an actress. Their largest obstacle is trying to assess whether the cast members are lying or telling the truth. Starring Alexa & Carlos PenaVega.

programme.title: Nikki & Nora: Sister Sleuths
programme.desc: Fraternal twins Nikki and Nora are forced back into each other's lives when they inherit a detective agency. As they solve a murder, they realize their differences may be their greatest advantage. Stars Hunter King, Rhiannon Fish.

programme.title: MatchMaker Mysteries: A Killer Engagement
programme.desc: When a woman is murdered, and her fiance is the prime suspect, successful matchmaker Angie works to prove her client's innocence, much to the dismay of Kyle, the detective working the case. Stars Danica McKellar, Victor Webster.

programme.title: MatchMaker Mysteries: A Fatal Romance
programme.desc: When a romance writer is murdered, matchmaker Angie Dove gets entangled in another case…and with Detective Kyle Carter. Can they read between the lines to find the murderer? Stars Danica McKellar, Victor Webster, Bruce Boxleitner.

programme.title: MatchMaker Mysteries: The Art of the Kill
programme.desc: Angie Dove gets Det. Carter's attention by stumbling on a murder at an art museum. Angie's father Nick is on his own case, trying to solve a series of petty thefts at the museum. Danica McKellar, Victor Webster, Bruce Boxleitner.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: A Puzzle to Die For
programme.desc: After several of her puzzles are linked to the murder of an art gallery owner, a crossword puzzle editor teams up with a no nonsense detective to stop a killer in their midst. Stars Lacey Chabert, Brennan Elliott.
